findings.evidence: Lines 136-139 say “the functor of points of `Spec H` evaluated at `A`”; lines 80 and 139 show the declaration assumes only `[Semiring H] [_root_.HopfAlgebra R H]`, while the module doc’s affine group scheme discussion separately requires `H` commutative at lines 27-31.
findings.fix: Restrict this docstring to the convolution group of algebra homomorphisms, or explicitly say the functor-of-points interpretation applies only under an additional commutativity assumption on `H`.
findings.issue: The `instGroup` docstring calls `WithConv (H →ₐ[R] A)` “the functor of points of `Spec H`” even though the instance only assumes `[Semiring H]` and not a commutative coordinate algebra; ordinary `Spec H`/affine group schemes are not available at this generality.

summary: One public instance docstring still overstates the geometric interpretation outside the commutative-coordinate-ring setting.
